items.title: Bonn: Beethoven's Birthplace
items.summary: Explore Bonn, one of Germany's oldest cities and the former capital of West Germany, famously known as the birthplace of Ludwig van Beethoven. There's plenty to see and do in this northwestern city.

items.title: Alles Muss Raus! - Theater-/Musikfest
items.summary: Germany's unique street theater and music festival features hundreds of artists from all over Europe, transforming the city center into a festival of encounters.

items.title: Greek Summer Night in Ramstein
items.summary: Experience a Greek-themed night with traditional music by "Mikri Kompania," a Greek dancing group, and authentic food and drinks.

items.title: Summer in the City
items.summary: Enjoy live music from various bands on Saturday evenings at the open-air stage in front of the Stadthalle in Landstuhl throughout the summer months.

items.title: The Fascination of Space with NASA Astronaut Kathryn Thornton
items.summary: Meet NASA astronaut Kathryn Thornton at the Technik Museum Speyer as she shares her experiences from space shuttle missions, followed by a Q&A and photo opportunity for children.

items.title: Weinkerwe Einselthum
items.summary: Visit this wine fair for fine wines, culinary specialties, live music, and surprises for children at winemakers' estates.

items.title: Building Strong and Ready Teams retreat
items.summary: This three-day retreat at Lake Bostalsee helps military couples strengthen their relationships through communication skills, conflict resolution, and emotional intimacy, with childcare provided.

items.title: Lake Bostalsee activities
items.summary: Families attending the 'Building Strong and Ready Teams' retreat also spent time together at Lake Bostalsee and nearby water parks, suggesting family-friendly activities.

items.title: Beetlejuice Jr. Auditions
items.summary: Youth aged 8 to 18 can audition for Beetlejuice Jr. at KMC Onstage, Kleber Kaserne, with show dates in October and November.

items.title: Dog Obedience Training
items.summary: Kaiserslautern Outdoor Recreation offers dog obedience training for dogs starting at eight weeks old, held on Saturdays at the Motor Pool on Pulaski Barracks.

items.title: Kaiserslautern’s End of Summer Car Show
items.summary: Participate in or attend the End of Summer Car Show at Pulaski Park on Pulaski Barracks, open to all military affiliated ID card holders.

items.title: Latin Nights at the Rheinlander!
items.summary: Enjoy Latin Night with live music by Salsa Band Borinkuba on the last Friday of the month at the Rheinlander Community Club. Food is available.

items.title: SKIES Gymnastics Enrollment
items.summary: Enroll your children aged 1 to 18 in SKIES Unlimited gymnastics classes in the Kaiserslautern Community. Open to all ID card holders.

items.title: Beethoven Walking Tour
items.summary: Explore Bonn's rich history with a self-guided walking tour featuring 16 points of interest related to Beethoven, including his birthplace museum and St. Remigius Parish Church.

items.title: Bonn Botanical Garden
items.summary: Explore Bonn's famous Botanical Garden, home to around 11,000 plant species in both indoor greenhouses and sprawling outdoor gardens.

items.title: Bonn Market Square and Altes Rathaus
items.summary: Visit Bonn's daily market in the city center, offering vendors and a great view of the beautiful Altes Rathaus, especially in the evening.

items.title: Bonner Münster
items.summary: Visit the grand Roman Catholic Church in the center of Bonn, featuring giant sculpted heads of Saint Cassius and Florentius.

items.title: Sterntor
items.summary: See the impressive 13th-century Roman gate, Sterntor, which was moved to a tourist-friendly location in Bonn.
